tasks.title: Bundled Snapshot Fallback
tasks.description: Create bundled snapshot fallback mechanism for offline mode. When network and disk cache are unavailable, the app should use a bundled snapshot of provider catalog to function. This includes creating snapshot.rs module, snapshot_data.rs with embedded provider data, and updating fetcher.rs fallback chain.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify is_snapshot_available() returns true when snapshot exists
AddUnitTest: verify get_snapshot() returns Some(SnapshotCatalog) when snapshot data is present
AddUnitTest: verify From<SnapshotCatalog> for ProviderCatalog conversion works correctly
AddRegressionTest: ensure fetcher fallback chain: memory cache -> disk cache -> bundled snapshot -> empty catalog works in correct order
AddErrorHandlingTest: test snapshot loading handles corrupted/malformed data gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: SnapshotCatalog struct should mirror ProviderCatalog structure. snapshot_data.rs should use include_bytes!() for static embedding. Fallback chain order: memory -> network -> disk -> bundled snapshot -> empty.

tasks.title: Snapshot Generation Script
tasks.description: Create scripts/generate-snapshot.sh to fetch models.dev API and generate Rust code for embedding. Script should fetch https://models.dev/api.json, transform JSON to Rust struct format, and write to crates/llm/src/catalog/snapshot_data.rs.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify script executes successfully and generates valid Rust code
AddIntegrationTest: verify generated snapshot_data.rs compiles with cargo build
AddRegressionTest: ensure build.sh runs snapshot generation when GENERATE_SNAPSHOT env var is set
RunTestSuite: execute scripts/generate-snapshot.sh and verify output file contains expected ProviderCatalog struct
tasks.impl_notes: Script must be executable (chmod +x). Should include timestamp and version metadata in generated output. Output format should be compatible with include_bytes!() macro.

tasks.title: Complete models.dev Integration
tasks.description: Verify and complete the fallback chain in fetcher.rs. Ensure clean fallback order: memory cache (5-min TTL) -> network fetch -> file cache (disk) -> bundled snapshot -> empty catalog. Update fetch_or_get_cached() with proper fallback documentation.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify memory cache is checked first with 5-min TTL
AddUnitTest: verify network fetch is attempted second on cache miss
AddUnitTest: verify file cache (disk) is used on network failure
AddRegressionTest: ensure no duplicate network requests when cache is valid
RunTestSuite: run all existing catalog tests to ensure fallback chain works
tasks.impl_notes: Clean fallback chain must be: memory -> network -> disk -> snapshot -> empty. Add clear comments documenting each stage. Verify all existing tests pass.

tasks.title: Dynamic Provider Loading
tasks.description: Create bundled_providers.rs with BUNDLED_PROVIDERS constant containing 20+ providers (@ai-sdk/anthropic, @ai-sdk/openai, @ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock, etc.). Implement provider factory pattern with lazy loading via once_cell::sync::Lazy. Integrate with provider registry for dynamic loading.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify BUNDLED_PROVIDERS contains 20+ provider entries
AddUnitTest: verify BundledProvider struct has name, package, factory fields
AddUnitTest: verify lazy loading works correctly with once_cell::sync::Lazy
AddIntegrationTest: verify provider registry can load providers dynamically by name
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing provider selection UI works with new dynamic loading
tasks.impl_notes: ProviderFactory type alias should be defined. Providers should use registry pattern for dynamic import. Lazy loading on first use to avoid upfront cost.

tasks.title: Amazon Bedrock Region Prefix Handling
tasks.description: Implement region prefix detection and endpoint mapping for Amazon Bedrock. Support prefixes: us.*, eu.*, jp.*, apac.*, au.* mapped to region codes. Implement get_region_prefix() and get_bedrock_endpoint() functions. Update BedrockProvider to route based on region.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify get_region_prefix() extracts correct prefix from model IDs (us.foo -> Some("us"), eu.bar -> Some("eu"))
AddUnitTest: verify get_bedrock_endpoint() returns correct URLs for US, EU, APAC regions
AddUnitTest: verify default endpoint is used when no region prefix is present
AddIntegrationTest: verify BedrockProvider routes requests to correct endpoint based on model ID prefix
AddErrorHandlingTest: test invalid region prefixes fall back to default endpoint

tasks.title: GitLab Duo Workflow Discovery
tasks.description: Create gitlab.rs module for GitLab AI Gateway model discovery. Implement GitLabProvider struct with instance_url, token, client. Fetch from /api/v1/ai/models endpoint with Bearer token. Implement should_enable_gitlab_duo() for feature flag checking. Integrate with catalog merger.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify GitLabProvider struct can be created with instance_url and token
AddUnitTest: verify discover_models() returns Vec<Model> from AI Gateway
AddUnitTest: verify should_enable_gitlab_duo() checks for gitlab_duo_workflow feature flag
AddIntegrationTest: verify GitLab provider integrates with catalog merger
AddErrorHandlingTest: test discovery handles missing/invalid tokens gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: Authorization header format: Authorization: Bearer {token}. AI Gateway endpoint: /api/v1/ai/models. Feature flag: gitlab_duo_workflow.

tasks.title: Cloudflare AI Gateway Provider
tasks.description: Create ai_gateway.rs module for Cloudflare AI Gateway. Define AiGatewayProvider struct with account_id and client. Implement complete() method for inference. Route requests through https://gateway.ai.cloudflare.com/v1/{account_id}/openai.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify AiGatewayProvider can be created with account_id
AddUnitTest: verify complete() method forwards requests to AI Gateway URL
AddIntegrationTest: verify AI Gateway provider registers correctly with provider registry
AddRegressionTest: ensure AI Gateway integration works with existing completion flow
tasks.impl_notes: Base URL format: https://gateway.ai.cloudflare.com/v1/{account_id}/openai. Handle response mapping to OpenCode completion response format.

tasks.title: Experimental Modes Mapping
tasks.description: Add ModelVariant struct with name and description fields. Add variants: Vec<ModelVariant> field to Model struct. Parse experimental.modes from models.dev in catalog merger. Update JSON serialization/deserialization and all Model::new() callers.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ModelVariant struct serializes/deserializes correctly
AddUnitTest: verify Model struct has variants: Vec<ModelVariant> field
AddUnitTest: verify parse_experimental_modes() correctly maps models.dev experimental.modes to ModelVariant
AddIntegrationTest: verify variant parsing works in full catalog merge flow
AddRegressionTest: ensure all Model::new() callers are updated with variants field
tasks.impl_notes: ModelVariant should have Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone derives. Handle None/empty variants gracefully in parsing.

tasks.title: CLI --refresh Flag
tasks.description: Add Refresh subcommand to CLI models command. Implement run_refresh() function that creates CatalogFetcher, calls force_refresh().await, and prints status. Add force_refresh() to CatalogFetcher that bypasses memory cache TTL and forces network fetch.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Refresh subcommand is parsed correctly with clap derive
AddUnitTest: verify force_refresh() bypasses memory cache TTL check
AddIntegrationTest: verify run_refresh() executes force_refresh and displays result
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing CLI tests still pass after adding Refresh command
RunTestSuite: run cargo test -p opencode-cli to verify no regressions
tasks.impl_notes: force_refresh() should force network fetch and update disk cache. Display refresh status (success/error message).

tasks.title: Alpha Model Filtering
tasks.description: Implement is_model_visible() function that checks model.status == ModelStatus::Alpha. If Alpha, check OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_MODELS env var. Return true only if env var equals 'true'. Apply filter in ModelRegistry::list_models() and CatalogFetcher::load_models().
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify alpha models are hidden by default (env var not set)
AddUnitTest: verify alpha models are visible when OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_MODELS='true'
AddUnitTest: verify non-alpha models are always visible regardless of env var
AddIntegrationTest: verify filtering works in ModelRegistry::list_models() and CatalogFetcher::load_models()
RunTestSuite: run all model-related tests to ensure filtering integrates correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Alpha models should be filtered out at load time, not at display time. Integration with OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_MODELS flag.

tasks.title: Per-Provider Headers Configuration
tasks.description: Add headers: Option<HashMap<String, String>> field to ProviderOptions. Update Serialize/Deserialize impls. Modify HTTP request construction to add headers to provider HTTP clients. Apply headers in BedrockProvider, OpenAIProvider, etc.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ProviderOptions.headers serializes/deserializes correctly
AddUnitTest: verify headers are correctly merged with default headers in HTTP requests
AddIntegrationTest: verify headers are applied in BedrockProvider, OpenAIProvider, and other providers
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing provider configurations still work after adding headers field
tasks.impl_notes: Headers should be merged with default headers, not replace them. Update config examples in opencode.json.example.

tasks.title: Model Variants Support
tasks.description: UI variant selection and propagation to provider at inference time. Update model picker dialog to show variant dropdown/selection. Store selected variant in session. Update CompletionRequest to include variant and propagate to provider implementations.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify variant selection is stored correctly in session
AddIntegrationTest: verify variant is passed to provider at inference time via CompletionRequest
AddIntegrationTest: verify model picker UI displays variant dropdown/selection
AddRegressionTest: ensure inference works correctly with and without variants selected
tasks.impl_notes: Much of this is covered by FR-025. Verify FR-025 completion before implementing. Variant should flow from picker -> session -> CompletionRequest -> provider.

tasks.title: Consolidate Dual Model Sources
tasks.description: Audit hardcoded models vs catalog models. Identify duplicates/conflicts between hardcoded models in models.rs and models from catalog fetcher. Plan and implement consolidation approach (catalog as single source of truth preferred).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all models are now loaded from catalog (no duplicates with hardcoded)
AddIntegrationTest: verify model registry works correctly with catalog-only models
AddRegressionTest: ensure all existing model-dependent functionality works after consolidation
RunTestSuite: run full test suite to verify no regressions from consolidation
tasks.impl_notes: Option A (preferred): Migrate all to catalog. Option B: Keep hardcoded as fallback. Document decision and rationale.

tasks.title: Rename transform.rs to message_transform.rs
tasks.description: Rename llm/src/transform.rs module to message_transform.rs. Update mod.rs import and all use statements across codebase. Verify all tests pass after rename.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure all imports referencing transform module are updated to message_transform
RunTestSuite: run cargo test -p opencode-llm to verify no broken references after rename
tasks.impl_notes: Module does message transformation, so message_transform.rs is more descriptive name.

tasks.title: Add models-dev Prefix to Provider IDs
tasks.description: Add prefix to provider IDs from models.dev: format!("models-dev-{}", provider.id). Update ProviderCatalog transformation and tests to reflect the prefixed IDs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify provider IDs from models.dev are prefixed with 'models-dev-'
AddIntegrationTest: verify provider registry correctly matches prefixed provider IDs
AddRegressionTest: ensure provider selection UI works correctly with prefixed IDs
tasks.impl_notes: Prefix prevents ID conflicts with hardcoded providers. Format: 'models-dev-{original_id}'.
